channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: MINA ROAD TPs ARE SPRAYED, 17th July
item.description:
RESIDENTS TPs ARE SPRAYED ON MINA ROAD OPPOSITE TO 72
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mina Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti all over working phone box, 17th July
item.description:
This multi-coloured graffiti which includes the familiar $V tag has been left on this phone box on Charlton Church Lane. It should be both reported as criminal damage and then removed at a cost to BT.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous footpath, 17th July
item.description:
The footpath between eastholm and Hutchings walk is broken up and raised making ot very dangerous under foot for elderly, wheelchairs and anyone hard of seeing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastholm, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th July
item.description:
An armchair, suitcase and lots of general food waste and rubbish in the area next to the pathway behind Marks and Spencer's carpark

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchmore Hill Road, Southgate

item.title: Leaking water from cover at corner of Westgate Road and Foxgrove Road on pavement, 17th July
item.description:
Been leaking since Tuesday at least. Steady stream of water across the road from the pavement. Corner near Regency Mews

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing waste and fly‑tipping issue outside 20 Bromley Grove, 17th July
item.description:
Residents of the individual flats at 20 Bromley Grove repeatedly leave broken furniture and household items outside the property and around the communal bins for 18 Bromley Grove. This has become a persistent problem and is affecting the appearance and cleanliness of the area. Please issue a formal warning to the managing agents or residents of this address, as the behaviour is ongoing and shows no regard for the surrounding neighbourhood.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Bromley Grove, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lorry bust several pavement slabs, 17th July
item.description:
Lorry pulled up in kerb and badly broke several slabs They are a trip hazard for a busy pavement (If this is a second report it’s because I didn’t see a confirmation for my first attempt)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Cat Hill, East Barnet, Chipping Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 17th July
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 17/07/26 09:47 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4214418, 0.0074142 what3words - manual.closed.switch Nearest address - 82 Valeswood Road, Bromley, BR1 4RD Just one fly tip cleared another appears in the same location probably with investigation as obviously local Reference - 5730265 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 17/07/2026 09:46 Just one fly tip cleared another appears in the same location probably with investigation as obviously local
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valeswood Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
